description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Win32/UWP build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow consists of two jobs: prechecks on windows-latest and build on windows-2022. The prechecks job clones two repositories, DiligentCore and DiligentTools, and runs a format validation script. The build job, which depends on prechecks, uses a matrix strategy to build the project with various configurations, including different toolsets, build types, and CMake generators. It checks out the code, sets up the build environment, configures CMake, builds the project, and runs several tests, including tools tests, GPU tests, and HLSL2GLSL converter tests. Finally, it uploads artifacts for certain build configurations.
